content.en:
The fall of the War Emperor Ancestor was just the beginning, all the Devouring Clans who were targeted by Ye Tian's copy body fell one by one, and no one could resist Ye Tian's casual blow.

One by one, the Devouring Clan fell, and the half-step domain ancestors from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm were much more relaxed.

Soon, the Blood Emperor Ancestor was targeted by Ye Tian.

"No!"

The Blood Emperor Ancestor wanted to escape, but was caught up by Ye Tian in an instant, and died with a spear.

Then, it was the turn of the Wanzhen Emperor Ancestor, and the Wanzhen Emperor Ancestor was also killed by Ye Tian.

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor wanted to escape, but he had already been surrounded by Jinchen Daozu and the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, where could he escape.

When Ye Tian arrived, the White Deer Emperor Ancestor forcibly urged the remaining origin power of the secret treasure, but he was still killed by Ye Tian with a few easy moves, and he was not an opponent at all.

As soon as the four great emperor ancestors died, the other devouring ones were quickly wiped out by Ye Tian and the others.

In a short period of time, only the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor was left in this void, the Devouring Clan.

"Let me go, you can't kill me, otherwise in the future, I will sneak attack your Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and even kill your relatives and friends, you can't stop me!"

The Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor threatened Ye Tian.

He didn't care about the lives of the other Devourers, they died when they died, but he didn't want to die.

He wants to live, but he doesn't want to continue to fight Ye Tian, who knows what will happen?

In case another strong man emerges from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and then besieges him, it is really possible to leave him here.

Therefore, he just wants to get out of here now.

"Can't kill you?"

Ye Tian sneered.

He has only used the Mixed Yuan Holy Body and the power of the Extreme Dao now, and there is still the Eternal Immortal Holy Body and the Holy Technique that have not yet been used!

Once he erupted with all his strength, he would be able to burst out with a combat power comparable to the Ninefold Return to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and it would not be difficult to kill a Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor.

Whether it is a holy technique, or an eternal immortal holy body, exposing one, Ye Tian is in trouble.

Moreover, the current Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm and the Dark Sanctuary have the Battle Realm Tower as a communication medium, so if someone spreads the picture of his battle, it is very likely that it will be exposed, although this possibility is very small, but he doesn't want such a thing to happen.

Therefore, he deliberately exposed a flaw and let the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor escape, while he continued to chase and kill.

Fleeing and chasing, the two quickly disappeared into this void.

As for the other half-step domain ancestors from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, they cleaned up the battlefield and did not keep up.

After all, their strength is too weak, what is the use of keeping up, but it will be a burden.

--------------------

Escaped for a long time.

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor even fled into the Dark Forbidden Realm.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, if you chase and kill me, you can't kill me, so why bother? I can guarantee that if you don't chase and kill me, I won't deal with you, and I will never even step into the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!" the Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor assured.

"Do you really think I can't kill you?"

Ye Tian laughed.

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor suddenly felt that something was wrong, and seemed to think that Ye Tian really had the strength to kill himself?

"Impossible, a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm can suppress me, a domain ancestor, it is no longer incomparably demonic, it is impossible to be more powerful!"

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor thought to himself.

But at this moment, Ye Tian's aura changed.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian urged the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, and his aura was much stronger than before.

At the same time, Ye Tian performed the holy technique - Golden Silk!

I saw Ye Tian use the Heaven Slaying Spear to perform the Golden Silk Sacred Technique, and a golden silk thread crossed the forbidden void.

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor couldn't react at all, and he couldn't even avoid it, and he was directly slashed by the Golden Silk Saint Technique.

Poof!!!!

The Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor's body was cut open, and the power of the Holy Technique continued to invade his body.

His body was disintegrating, and the blow was more powerful than he had ever imagined.

He wanted to suppress this force, but he couldn't.

Under this blow, he has been hit hard, like never before.

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor forcibly allowed the two bodies to heal, but this was only a fake healing, not a real healing.

"Run!"

The Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor used his secret technique to escape, but his secret technique was too spicy in Ye Tian's eyes.

Ye Tian was proficient in all kinds of forbidden Dao techniques, and all of them had cultivated to the extreme level.

In terms of speed, the Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor was far inferior to Ye Tian.

Before, he deliberately let the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor escape, but now Ye Tian is unwilling to hide, and the Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor can't escape.

"Shadow Thorn!"

Ye Tian's blow ignored the distance and pierced through the Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor who was rapidly fleeing.

Then, the continuous attacks made the Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor's injuries more and more serious.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian once again performed the Golden Silk Sacred Technique.

Poof!!!

The Golden Silk of the Holy Technique once again cut through the body of the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor.

Under this blow, the Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor's physical body could no longer be maintained, and completely disintegrated.

"What kind of trick are you?"

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor asked before he died.

"You want to know?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor nodded.

"I'm sorry I didn't tell you!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"You ......"

The Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor was very angry, he was going to die, and Ye Tian didn't even answer him to this question!

In the next moment, the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor's body completely collapsed, and his soul also dissipated.

Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor, fall!

"The Holy Technique is too powerful, the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor obviously has a secret technique that is not weak, and the recovery speed is very fast, almost immortal, but there is still no way to block the power of the Holy Technique, I am afraid that it is an ordinary new Domain Ancestor in the Divine Heaven Realm, I can also kill it." But if you want to kill an ordinary new domain ancestor in the Dark Sanctuary, it will be too difficult!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After killing the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor, Ye Tian returned to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

When Ye Tian came back, the Wind Mountain Lord appeared.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, has the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor escaped?"

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain asked.

"He's dead!" Ye Tian replied.

"What, the Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor is dead?"

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain was shocked.

That's a domain ancestor, Ye Tian can defeat a domain ancestor, and killing a domain ancestor, that concept is completely different!

He didn't think that Ye Tian would deliberately brag, there was no need.

At Ye Tian's level, he would hardly lie deliberately.

Besides, he wouldn't think that Ye Tian would lie.

In other words, Ye Tian really killed a domain ancestor with his own strength.

And Ye Tiancai is only a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm!

"It's so wicked!!"

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain exclaimed.

In his concept, I am afraid that in the Dark Sacred Domain, Ye Tian is undoubtedly an incomparably demonic genius.

At the very least, he communicated with those half-step domain ancestors of the Dark Sacred Domain, and he had not heard that the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm could kill a weaker domain ancestor, even if it was a domain ancestor of the realm, it was not comparable to the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

But Ye Tian did it!

As for how to do it, he didn't ask, obviously it would involve Ye Tian's secret technique and other means.

He knew that Ye Tian would definitely not speak, so he would not be bored.
